## Guidewire Software Rises 6.3% After Addition to Russell Value Indexes

The move is mechanical — driven by passive rebalancing flows, not a fundamental re-rating. For an active PM, this may create a cleaner entry or exit window around the rebalancing date rather than constituting a thesis event.

- GWRE shares gained 6.3% following its addition to the Russell Value Indexes.
- Coverage explicitly frames this as a broad index inclusion event, not a company-specific fundamental catalyst.
- Passive rebalancing flows are mechanical and typically transient around the effective date.
- Single-outlet (SimplyWallSt); no change to business fundamentals implied.
